title: aureolaria levigata
intro: Aureolaria levigata, also known as the smooth orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, which is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of nearby plants. The medicinal properties of Aureolaria levigata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. Herbal preparations of Aureolaria levigata can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
